notes: TUI interview, setup script, and verification script all absent without skill
profile-gate-first and logs-operation assertions are fully discriminating: 100% pass with skill, 0% without
platform-detection and checks-already-installed pass in both configurations — they test general competence, not skill value
fresh-ubuntu-setup shows largest delta (+60%) — the skill's TUI interview and script flags have no equivalent in general knowledge
With-skill runs use ~72% more tokens and ~38% more time, but produce fully structured operational workflows
MCP diagnose with-skill produced 14 steps vs 10 without — the extra steps are profile gate, task qualification, SimpleMem, and registry cross-reference
